should_trigger.prompt: Implementation and review are complete. Run final verification and write verify.md.
Rerun the pipeline after the fix and record fresh evidence.
Before saying done, prove the tests and gates passed.

should_not_trigger.prompt: The spec still has unclear acceptance criteria.
The failing command output is unexplained; find the root cause.
Split this approved spec into tasks.

assertions: Runs fresh commands before claiming completion.
Records command, result, and residual risk in verify.md.
Switches to debugging when failures are unexplained.
